purpose: Initializes program by accepting current date and displaying startup messages.
Reads the next authorization summary from IMS, updates counters, and processes associated details if account ID is numeric.
Displays a message indicating the file closing process.
Inserts the parent authorization segment into GSAM file using IMS call and abends on failure.
Finds the next authorization detail segment for the current parent and inserts it into GSAM, setting end-of-child flag when no more exist.
Terminates the program with return code 16 when an IMS database call fails unexpectedly.
Inserts the current authorization detail record into the GSAM output file using IMS DL/I call.
Terminates the program with return code 16 when a GNP call to retrieve the next child segment fails.
Terminates the program with return code 16 when an ISRT call to insert a parent segment into GSAM fails.
Terminates the program with return code 16 when an ISRT call to insert a child segment into GSAM fails.
